query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN address IS NOT NULL AND address != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_address FROM contact_cache WHERE tenantId = 960028;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bTLYzeacnuAd6z.root --database nusXfQu5XBTMz3NUCR6brb --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN address IS NOT NULL AND address != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_address FROM contact_cache WHERE tenantId = 960028;
